testcase.name: test_copyright
testcase.failure: test/test_copyright.py:23: in test_copyright assert rc == 0, 'Found errors' E AssertionError: Found errors E assert 1 == 0

testcase.name: test_flake8

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 74 code style errors / warnings: ./setup.py:15:100: E501 line too long (101 > 99 characters) ./dobot_diagnostics/diagnostics_utils.py:42:29: E225 missing whitespace around operator ./dobot_diagnostics/diagnostics_utils.py:46:22: E225 missing whitespace around operator ./dobot_diagnostics/diagnostics_utils.py:48:100: E501 line too long (161 > 99
